S.FORM: Cliff Barker nalecuhan i Atlanta, Georgia, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Cliff Barker i 1949 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 5 ku uwac, namapili' tu nu Washington Capitols putiput. 2 bulad 15 demiad, 1921 a mihca, Cliff Barker, miunduay. (mapatay i 1998 a mihca)
S.PHON: ¶r~…ĺiff bark…ôr nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i atr~…ĺanta, g…ôorgia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput. ¶r~…ĺiff bark…ôr i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu wasńßiŇčton ¶apitor~…ĺs putiput. * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, ¶r~…ĺiff bark…ôr, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a mińß ¶a)
S.FORM: Cliff Barker nalecuhan i Atlanta, Georgia, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Cliff Barker i 1949 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 5 ku uwac, namapili' tu nu Washington Capitols putiput. 2 bulad 15 demiad, 1921 a mihca, Cliff Barker, miunduay. (mapatay i 1998 a mihca)
